mapper.select: select * from activityrank where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} and type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}
select * from activityrank where send = #{send,jdbcType=BIT} and id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} and type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into activityrank values (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{type, jdbcType=INTEGER},#{funtionV, jdbcType=INTEGER},#{rankDate, jdbcType=INTEGER},#{name, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},#{serverId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{plat, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{serial,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{send,jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.update: update activityrank set id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, roleId = #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, funtionV = #{funtionV, jdbcType=INTEGER}, rankDate = #{rankDate, jdbcType=BIGINT}, name = #{name, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, serverId = #{serverId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}, plat = #{plat, jdbcType=INTEGER}, serial = #{serial,jdbcType=INTEGER}, send = #{send,jdbcType=BIT} where roleId = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} and type = #{type, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.delete: delete from activityrank where id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
